journeys.title: Launch Electrical Services Presence
journeys.description: Build foundational digital marketing for electrical services
steps: Set up Google Business Profile with complete NAP
Create Facebook Business page with service areas
Optimize website for local SEO keywords

journeys.title: Drive Local Search Traffic
journeys.description: Dominate local search results for electrical services
steps: Audit and optimize on-page SEO elements
Set up Google Ads Local Services Ads campaign

journeys.title: Build Social Proof & Community
journeys.description: Generate reviews and community engagement across platforms
steps: Set up review request workflows (email, SMS, QR codes)
Create content calendar and editorial guidelines
Implement Facebook review management and response system
